residual_risks.risk: Integration test imports `fake-indexeddb/auto` but its side-effect will apply to all tests in the suite, not just the three in this file. Vitest worker isolation (one worker per file by default) mitigates this; if pool: 'forks' is ever changed to 'threads', fake-indexeddb could interfere with other test files in the same thread.

testing_gaps.gap: The `readCredential` import is not directly tested in isolation — dependency is mocked in both test files. There is no test verifying the integration between `getDecryptedApiKeyForProvider` and the real `vaultCredentials.readCredential` function.
